title: 0guard HackQuest Required X Post
text: 0guard is a pre-wallet firewall for AI agents: intent, calldata, domains, and exploit intelligence checked before any signer can act. Built on 0G with Galileo read proof, receipt anchors, and Storage-ready roots. @0G_labs @0g_CN @0g_Eco @HackQuest_ #0GHackathon #BuildOn0G
